steps.instruction: Turn sharp left onto Nsooba Kyebando Road
Turn left onto Northern Bypass, M20
Enter the roundabout and take the 1st exit onto A5
Enter the roundabout and take the 3rd exit onto A2
Continue straight onto Kampala - Masaka Road, A2
Enter the roundabout and take the 2nd exit onto Masaka Bypass
Enter the roundabout and take the 2nd exit onto Mbarara - Masaka Road, A2
Enter the roundabout and take the 1st exit onto Mbarara - Masaka Road, A2
Enter the roundabout and take the 2nd exit onto High Street, A2
Turn right onto Bishop Stretcher Road
Arrive at 2nd Circular Drive, on the right
